detail.description: 【Game Introduction】 Identity V is NetEase's first asymmetrical competitive mobile game. Its grotesque gothic art style, suspenseful and brain-teasing storyline, and thrilling 1v4 asymmetrical gameplay will bring players a brand new gaming experience. Players will become detective Orpheus, who, after receiving a mysterious letter of commission, enters the infamous manor to investigate a missing person case. During the evidence investigation, Orpheus will use deductive reasoning to review the case

eventMentions.text: this is an amazing but underrated game. (2.9 at the time). here's my viewpoint on some issues people
兩三年沒玩，重新登陸後發現帳號被收回了，一登陸直接從頭開始。登陸前確定自己綁定的gmail帳號是正確的，但是過去充錢買的皮膚啥的完全憑空消失，奉勸各位玩家，想玩可以，別充錢！別充錢！別充錢！否則哪天帳
nostalgic. loved the anniversary stories and side events.
